News

Details

Date: 10 February 2026

Doğuş Üniversitesi–Dudullu OSB Collaboration Continues Strongly

The meeting held between DOU and Dudullu OSB, began with our senior Acting student, Mirali Murat CELEN, opening the program with a special Meddah performance themed around communication. Also in the meeting, humanoid robot Dora took place to show how science is linked with campus life.

During the meeting, strategic topics to strengthen university-indusrty collaboration were discussed. Accreditation and quality processes, newly launched post graduate programs, academic publishing performance, technological infrastructure investments and career and alumni activities were evaluated.

It was noted that the ACQUIN accreditation process is progressing in a constructive and development-oriented manner, with the aim of enhancing industry integration through the Executive MBA program and new graduate programs. The positive contribution of the recent increase in academic publications to the university's position in international rankings was also highlighted.

Furthermore, it was stated that joint university-industry projects would be expanded within the scope of robotic systems, digital projects, and the BWI HUB structure. Emphasizing the importance of students gaining practical experience through technical field trips and industry collaborations, a consensus was reached to ensure the sustainability of this partnership
